title: Senior SEO Specialist at Myntra International Enterprises

jsonLd.title: Senior SEO Specialist at Myntra International Enterprises
jsonLd.description:
Myntra International Enterprises, one of India's leading organizations, is hiring a SEO Specialist for our Gurgaon operations. We offer a competitive salary package along with world-class benefits.

About Myntra International Enterprises:
Myntra International Enterprises is a leading organization in the Hybrid sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Manage product listings, pricing, and promotions on the platform
• Track key performance indicators including GMV, conversion rate, and ROI
• Develop and implement category growth strategies
• Analyze sales data and customer behavior to drive revenue growth
• Execute digital marketing campaigns across Google, Meta, and other channels
• Build and maintain affiliate and influencer marketing programs
• Manage customer reviews, ratings, and return/refund processes

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• B.Sc / M.Sc in Life Sciences
• 1-3 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Influencer Marketing
• Proficiency in Google Analytics
• Proficiency in Facebook Ads
• Proficiency in Data Analytics
• Proficiency in WooCommerce
• Proficiency in Email Marketing
• Proficiency in Supply Chain
• Proficiency in Customer Segmentation

Work Mode: Hybrid - Flexible work-from-home and office

What We Offer:
• Referral bonus program
• International travel opportunities for senior roles
• Work-from-home flexibility
• Modern office with recreational facilities
• Flexible working hours
• Annual performance appraisal
• Salary Range: 4 LPA - 9 LPA per annum

Location: Gurgaon, Haryana, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Myntra International Enterprises!
